anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Wet-room shower head extracted from architect Rev-B plan dated 2026-05-12; central position with linear floor drain; thermostatic mixer at 1500mm AFF on east wall.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §701 (wet-room expansion per IET GN7 commentary — no §701 sub-clause for wet-room expansion in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: Wet-room rule: Zone 1 EXPANDS to the full floor area to 2.25m AFF because the entire floor is a wet area (is_wet_room=true). Citation routed through generic §701 + IET GN7 commentary because the verified BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 file has no §701 sub-clause for the wet-room expansion. Polygon = full room. IPx4 baseline (shower is not a water-jets fitting — §701.512.2 lift does not apply here).

electrical_constraints._derivation_note: 30 mA RCD on all LV circuits in shower_room per §701.411.3.3. Heater exemption is sauna-specific (§703.411.3.3) and does not apply.

assumptions: Wet-room Zone 1 expansion to full floor area is sourced from IET GN7 wet-room commentary; the verified BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 file contains no §701 sub-clause for the wet-room expansion — citation reverts to generic §701.
Shower head at 2150mm AFF; Zone 1 ceiling capped at the lower of 2250mm or shower-head height = 2250mm (shower head sits 100mm below default Zone 1 ceiling).
Zone 0 omitted: wet-room shower has no basin to enclose.

invariants.evidence: 1 anchor (shower_1) produces 1 zone (zone_shower_1_z1_wetroom = full floor). No Zone 0 in wet-room (no basin). No Zone 2 because Zone 1 covers the entire room polygon already. overlapping_with_zone_ids[] empty — only one zone exists.
existing_fixtures_audit[] has 2 compliant entries; non_compliance_flags[] empty. One-to-one trivially holds.
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone. §710 medical IT system requirement N/A.
room_type=shower_room; rcd_blanket_by_room constraint present with rcd_rating_ma=30 and sauna_heater_excluded=false per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3.
Not a pool hall. §702.415.1 main equipotential bonding N/A.
No bath_basin anchor. §701.512.2 whirlpool pump constraint N/A.

2 fixtures audited: lum_1 (IPx5, 230V) at the shower head x/y position at ceiling — derived_zone_id null because z=2300 > Zone 1 height_max=2250; PASS. fan_1 (IPx4, 230V) at (1750,750,2100) inside zone_shower_1_z1_wetroom — type allowed (wall_extract_fan not in prohibited list), IPx4 ≥ Zone 1 IPx4 min, voltage 230V ≤ 230V, not a switch; PASS.
compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no overlapping zone declarations (1 zone only). Self-consistency holds.

rationale.chat_summary: Standalone wet-room shower room — 1800×1500mm with is_wet_room=true. Zone 1 expands to the FULL floor area to 2.25m AFF per BS 7671:2018 §701 + IET GN7 commentary (no §701 sub-clause for wet-room expansion in verified file). 1 zone + 1 rcd_blanket constraint. 2 fixtures (IPx5 ceiling luminaire + IPx4 extract fan) both compliant. All 10 INVs PASS.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701 governs shower room zoning. §701.411.3.3 mandates 30 mA RCD blanket. IET GN7 wet-room commentary (not codified in the verified BS 7671 file) extends Zone 1 to cover the full floor area when the entire floor is a wet area — citation routed honestly through generic §701 plus the cross-reference to GN7.

sections.title: Wet-room zone derivation logic
sections.summary: Standard §701 zone-table places Zone 1 as the vertical projection above the bath polygon. For a wet-room (is_wet_room=true), the polygon expands to the full room floor because the entire floor is a wet area — there is no dry zone to which Zone 2 could extend. Zone 0 is omitted because there is no basin to enclose. Zone 2 is omitted because Zone 1 already covers the full room (no further 600 mm extension is possible inside the room). Net result: 1 zone, the full floor, to 2250 mm AFF.

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Three honest disclosures recorded in calculation_summary.assumptions[]: wet-room Zone 1 expansion is from IET GN7 commentary (no §701 sub-clause); shower head at 2150mm AFF — the lower of 2250mm or shower-head height; Zone 0 omitted because no basin exists. The citation discipline cites generic §701 + IET GN7 cross-reference — banned §701 sub-clauses (per spec §3.2) explicitly not used.

sections.title: Failure modes considered
sections.summary: If a 230 V socket were sited inside the wet-room polygon, INV-08 sub-rule type_prohibited would FAIL (sockets are in Zone 1 prohibited_fixture_types). If a luminaire were sited at IPx3, INV-08 sub-rule ip_below_min would FAIL (Zone 1 IPx4 minimum). The IPx5 ceiling luminaire and IPx4 extract fan both satisfy the IP minimum cleanly.
